channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: No bus timtables, 22nd May
item.description:
There are no bus time tables to show times of buses at bus stops
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Andoversford, Cotswold
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Gravell on the new cycleway at the entrance to the car boot site to Cheltenham Racecourse., 22nd May
item.description:
ON the new Cheltenham to Bishops Cleeve Cycle Spine (A435), near the entrance to the car boot at Cheltenham Racecourse.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Evesham Road, Kingsditch, Cheltenham, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Other damage to pavement i.e. cobbles, raised mound/surface

item.title: Street light not working, 22nd May

item.title: TMC - Defects - Signs & Street Furniture problem, 22nd May
item.description:
Damaged Street Furniture CW 1 x SV Cover in hours 2hr Emergency Stop and go TM MAKE SAFE ONLY...S81 Will be raised Stats Required (Damaged Street Furniture)
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Deep pothole on roundabout, 22nd May
item.description:
2 foot and 2foot wide deep pothole. Dangerous to motorcycle and cars.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Elmbridge Court Roundabout, Elmbridge, Gloucester
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Unpermitted roadworks problem, 22nd May
item.description:
Customer reports that black tape has been placed over the no entry signs. Traffic is now going the wrong way through what is a One Way system, which is dangerous. They report that no notice was given for these works and the situation is dangerous; they were nearly knocked over. They query what is happening and when this will be rectified?
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: 1x10 inch hole, approx 5ft past door in school building., 22nd May
item.description:
As above + another very nearby.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Gardners Lane, Wymans Brook, Cheltenham, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Tree is damaged problem, 22nd May
item.description:
Trees overhanging pavement
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Overgrown, 22nd May
item.description:
Please cut back as affecting use of path

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Cox's Way, Gloucester
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: This device is causing electricity surges in my house. I wake up in the morning and my hair is stood up and I can feel the electricity pulsing through the house. I have spoken to gigaclear and National grid and they told me to contact you. Please can this be moved as people are selling their houses because of this., 22nd May
item.description:
Device on column 5 - please call me.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 29, Cheltenham Road, Winchcombe, Winchcombe, Tewkesbury
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Loose slab and large gaps around catv box, 22nd May
item.description:
Outside number 46 opp 47

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 26, Duke Street, Ewens Farm, Cheltenham, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet
